gist.headline: Fresh off the press
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just updated the README with the latest community news and apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to feature the latest news and recent community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page fresh with the latest community highlights.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot updating a digital bulletin board or newspaper, with Polly the bee reading the latest headlines.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning a pixelated newspaper to a wooden bulletin board. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby, reading the news. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, nostalgic but beautiful.
